perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white shirt and black dress, stands in a warehouse store aisle holding two large cartons of eggs. She gestures enthusiastically towards the camera while large text overlays appear above her. (2) The camera pans to show several nearly empty shelves in the refrigerated section of the warehouse. (3) The scene shifts to a close-up shot of the egg cartons being opened on a light-colored table. (4) A pair of hands picks up one egg, showing its surface, and then brings in another egg from a different source for a side-by-side comparison, tapping the shells against each other.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. A woman speaks in a high-pitched, excited tone about finding a specific product at a warehouse store. (2) A man's voice enters, sounding supportive and adding details about the product's availability and quality. (3) Ambient noise from the warehouse is faintly audible in the background. (4) Distinct clinking sound effects are heard as the eggshells are tapped together, and 'pop' sound effects coincide with text appearing on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is at the top. Subtitles track the dialogue: 'Finally bought it!', 'Humane eggs...', '9.3 yuan each!', 'Scarcity on shelves...'. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Hidden gem must buy!' and 'Lvxi Farm Flat-floor Red-shell Eggs' appear in large, colorful fonts. Emotional stickers and variety-show style captions are used throughout.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in warehouse -> Proof of scarcity -> Home unboxing and quality comparison

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main presenter, 1 male whose hands and partial body are visible during the comparison section.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a black jumper dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First, the aisles of a Costco warehouse with shelves and boxes; later, a clean, well-lit indoor surface used for product demonstration.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Scarcity Evidence -> Value Proposition -> Comparative Proof
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a consumer recommendation for 'Lvxi Farm' eggs available at Costco. It combines an energetic store visit with a practical quality test to persuade viewers that these eggs are a high-value, high-quality purchase that is worth seeking out despite limited stock.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter specifically promotes the 'Lvxi Farm' brand, demonstrates its superior shell hardness, and emphasizes the competitive price at Costco.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration paired with dense, colorful Traditional Chinese text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The focus on 'humane' farming practices ('flat-floor') and price-per-unit metrics appeals to a modern, value-conscious demographic.
